case_title: SELENE VALENCIA VS. HARSH JOHARI ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY VALENCIA, SELENE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHARI, HARSH HIRA, GOVINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHARI, HARSH HIRA, GOVINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT VALENCIA, SELENE PLEASE SEE MC-025. NO MONEY IS OWED TO THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
